title: Ondagi Baalu
subTitle: After finishing his education, Tyagaraj, a young man, marries Leela, his girlfriend. Things change when her prideful nature causes her to separate him from his family.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura receives word of Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati's newborn and sets out to locate him. Meanwhile, Karthikeya engages in battle with Tarakasura's followers to demonstrate Lord Shiva's supremacy.

title: Plus
subTitle: Jai decides to protect himself from his enemies. To everyone's surprise, he recruits a team of people with various psychological disorders to help him.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva sets Tarakasura's sons and Asura Guru free from captivity, cautioning them about their inevitable downfall in their next confrontation. Will Tarakasura's sons heed this warning seriously?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya transforms into Sadananda with six faces as his mothers attempt to feed him. Meanwhile, Tarakasura's sons conduct a dark ritual, summoning Goddess Parvati.

title: Sirivantha
subTitle: Narayana Murthy wages a courageous battle to withstand all pressures and fight against corruption to retain the values he has cherished.

title: Gandhada Gudi
subTitle: When forest officer Kumar protects natural resources from poachers, their boss, Anand, becomes his main rival. But little does Kumar know that Anand is his brother.

title: ABHIMANYU
subTitle: Arjun seeks to change the education system by putting his life at risk to nationalise private schools in the country. Will he succeed in his efforts?

title: Mahakshathriya
subTitle: A young man, who is short-tempered, is sent to jail for committing a murder. However, his life takes a turn for the better when a prison officer tries to bring about a change in him.

title: Aajay
subTitle: Ajay, a kabaddi player, hides Padma from Veerabhadra, a gangster who wants to force her into marrying him. Soon, the two fall in love.

title: Pakkadmane Hudugi
subTitle: Balu, a 26-year-old bachelor, falls in love with his neighbour's daughter, Indu. He decides to woo her with the help of his music composer friend, Chakravarthy.

title: Pakkadmane Hudugi
subTitle: Balu, a 26-year-old bachelor, falls in love with his neighbour's daughter, Indu. He decides to woo her with the help of his music composer friend, Chakravarthy.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Shankachuda, having lost his men in the battle, extends an invitation to Kartikeya to confront Tarakasura. Will Kartikeya accept Shankachuda's challenge and face Tarakasura in battle?

title: Rajahamsa
subTitle: Raj, born into a wealthy family and known for living life to the fullest, discovers a woman named Hamsa through a deceased man's diary. He finds himself falling in love with her.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's sons undertake a strenuous worship of Goddess Parvati. When she doesn't respond, Lord Shiv and the Goddess engage in a heated argument.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Goddess Parvati manifests before Tarakasura's sons in the eternal beauty of Tripura Sundari avatar, assuring them protection from future adversities in this divine form.

title: Aajay
subTitle: Ajay, a kabaddi player, hides Padma from Veerabhadra, a gangster who wants to force her into marrying him. Soon, the two fall in love.

title: Rowdy Aliya
subTitle: Raja, a smart young man, meets Rani, an arrogant and selfish young woman. Raja decides to teach Rani a lesson; however, he gradually falls in love with her.

title: Vaasu Naan Pakka Commercial
subTitle: Vaasu is the typical happy-go-lucky youngster. He lands up at a police station, where he asks the inspector to write an FIR that he will kill his girlfriend. When questioned why, one gets to listen to his love story, which is 'pakka commercial'.

In 1999, lowly thieves Sachin (Kunal Khemu) and Zaramud (Cyrus Broacha) get caught up in a high-speed chase that wrecks their stolen car, which unfortunately belongs to high-ranking gangster AGM (Mahesh Manjrekar). He offers Sachin and Zaramud the chance to work off their debt, and soon they find themselves traveling the country collecting AGM's outstanding gambling debts. As a cricket scandal engulfs India, the pair find themselves in increasingly dangerous situations.

title: Varsha
subTitle: After his mother's death and father's arrest, Sathya brings up his seven sisters like a father. But a villainous character from his father's past turns the siblings against each other.

title: Rowdy
subTitle: Anna rules over Rayalaseema with a good heart. However, when a project threatens the well-being of his people, he does everything he can to oppose it and angers dangerous people as a result.

title: Rowdy
subTitle: Anna rules over Rayalaseema with a good heart. However, when a project threatens the well-being of his people, he does everything he can to oppose it and angers dangerous people as a result.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva chooses to partake in the feast sent by Nandi and the devotees instead of Kartikeya's offering, which disappoints Parvati. Later, Shiva becomes concerned when Kartikeya discovers their true relationship.

title: O Premave
subTitle: Raja, a young man, crosses paths with Prema and falls in love with her. However, their union is opposed by her father, who wishes her to get married to a man of his choice.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya persists in his determination and summons Goddess Parvati to disclose the identity of his father. Expressing his resentment, he condemns his father for abandoning him throughout the years.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati's silence regarding his father's identity leaves Kartikeya disheartened. He resolves to seek answers directly from Lord Shiva.

title: Varsha
subTitle: After his mother's death and father's arrest, Sathya brings up his seven sisters like a father. But a villainous character from his father's past turns the siblings against each other.

title: Ganeshana Galate
subTitle: Burdened by his wife's endless demands, Ganesh's despair leads him to attempt suicide. Unbeknownst to him, a bounty hunter is on the prowl for him.

title: Nagadevathe
subTitle: Naganna, a worshipper of the snake goddess, vows celibacy in her honour, but is seduced by a dancer. But when he dies from a snake bite, his brother starts to despise the deity.

title: Goonda Mattu Police
subTitle: ACP Bhavani and a common man, Gandhi, fight against the corrupt defence officials and politicians who are exploiting the society.

title: Bahubali 2: The Conclusion
subTitle: After learning that his father was brutally killed by Bhallaladeva, Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat him and release his mother from the former's captivity.

title: Payanigaru
subTitle: Five friends take a break from their jobs and families to go on a road trip to Goa. However, what starts as a fun outing for the group soon turns into a life-changing journey.
